description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a light wood exterior and a dark, multi-faceted roof. The structure features large, vertically oriented windows on the front and side, allowing for ample natural light. A detached garage with a matching roof and siding sits adjacent to the main house, connected by a paved driveway. The property is landscaped with a row of conical evergreen trees along the perimeter and several shrubs near the entrance. The front entrance is sheltered by a small porch with a flat roof and glass doors. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, light-wood bungalow with large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped with evergreen trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, detached garage, and a row of evergreen trees along the property edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, porch, garage with open door, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the large side windows and the full row of evergreens, with the garage partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house with expansive windows, the porch area, and the garage separated from the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side
